notes: Big anti-ban + stability update. New: a soft-ban cooldown timer with a live 'safe to catch/spin' countdown; a speed governor that keeps movement under ban-triggering speeds; GPS 'breathing' so a parked location looks natural instead of frozen; a tunnel health indicator with best-effort auto-reconnect and a low-memory warning; pre-flight checks (Precise Location + network-vs-GPS mismatch); resume-your-spoof after an interruption; and an expanded Error 11/12 + tunnel help guide with a plain-language ban ladder.
